problem id: 6cb5aff2
category: bit_manipulation

rule: ROT(6) AND NOT SHL(7)

examples:
  10100100 -> 00101001
  01011110 -> 10010111
  00100100 -> 00001001
  11111011 -> 01111110
  10111010 -> 10101110
  00011111 -> 01000111
  10010011 -> 01100100
  11111101 -> 01111111
  01000100 -> 00010001

query: 11111001
predicted answer: 01111110
